caption: A man wearing a dark jacket is seated in the back of a car, facing several microphones from news outlets, including one with a prominent "ANI" logo and another from "NATION." He is surrounded by journalists who are attempting to interview him. The scene is framed by a news broadcast overlay featuring a red and yellow color scheme. On-screen text in Hindi includes the words "BREAKING," "डिग्री CM," and names such as "सुब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "विजेन्द्र यादव," and "श्रवण कुमार." Small portrait photos of these individuals appear on the sides of the screen. The top red banner initially reads "नीतीश को तेजस्व" before changing in subsequent frames to "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A digital clock at the bottom right shows "10:02 PM," and the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the top right corner. The man remains in the car throughout the sequence, with minimal movement as the text on the banners updates.
